title: Existing Impression CTR Attack
principle: Existing pages with impressions are more valuable than new pages. Fix what's already visible.

daily_process.step_2: Find pages with position 5-20 AND 0 clicks (highest priority)
daily_process.step_3: Improve title, meta description, and above-fold answer
daily_process.step_4: Do NOT give full answer away in snippet if it kills clicks
daily_process.step_5: Keep helpful but invite calculator use
daily_process.step_6: Max 3 pages per day — quality over quantity

top_priority_pos_5_20_0_clicks.action: Optimize title and meta to include 'Calculator' and 'Monthly Payment'. Add direct answer above fold.
Review title — may be too news-focused. Add calculator CTA in meta.
Check if title and meta are compelling. Add 'calculate your payout' CTA.
Already ranking well. Title and meta may need stronger value prop.
Near top. Meta may be giving answer away. Adjust to invite click.
Title + meta audit. Consider adding '2026' for freshness.

secondary_pos_20_50_some_impressions.action: Position too deep for CTR fix — needs ranking improvement first
Position improving but still deep. Monitor, don't edit (Phase 31 edit hold active)

ctr_fix_template.after_title: Proposed title with stronger CTA or number specificity
ctr_fix_template.query_targeted: The specific search query this page is targeting

dont_give_answer_away: The snippet should show enough to prove relevance but not the full calculation result. The user should need to click to get their specific number. For calculator pages: 'Enter your numbers to see your personalized result' is better than showing a sample result.
